//: REFERENCE ONLY — Claude Code does NOT load this file (it reads only settings.json + settings.local.json). This is a catalogue of commonly-used keys with example values; copy what you actually want into settings.json and give it real values. Keys prefixed with // are inert comment placeholders.
//model: Default model for the project. Aliases: sonnet | opus | haiku | fable, or a full id.
//permissions: allow pre-approves; deny blocks. defaultMode: default | acceptEdits | plan | dontAsk | bypassPermissions. additionalDirectories grants access to paths OUTSIDE the workspace (sub-repos nested inside the umbrella are already in scope, so they do NOT need listing here).
//env: Environment variables injected into every session in this project.
//hooks: Harness-run logic on lifecycle events. Two examples below: (1) the REAL SessionStart memory self-heal we use, and (2) an illustrative PreToolUse gate on Bash.
//statusLine: Custom status line: a command that prints one line, or point at .claude/status-line.md.
//other-common-keys: A few more you may want — uncomment into settings.json as needed:
